Only by turning your head aside momentarily can you see what is beneath the seemingly solid pattern. By plunging into our ocean of value climate you can dive beneath your camouflage system and look up to see it, relatively foundationless, floating above you, moved, formed, and directed by the shifting illusions caused by the wind of will, and the force of subconscious concentration and demand.
quotes.translation: 然而，所需要的不仅仅是脱掉衣服。要潜入这片海洋，你也要把身体留在岸边。当你回来时，它会在那里。你的伪装模式可以比作太阳和阴影投射在不停波动的波浪上的图案。只要你记住图案，你就创造它，它就在那里。如果你把头转开一会儿，然后迅速回头，你只能看到波浪。你的伪装和你的世界是由有意识的聚焦和无意识的专注创造的。只有通过暂时把头转向一边，你才能看到看似坚固的图案之下是什么。通过潜入我们的价值气候海洋，你可以潜到你的伪装系统之下，抬头看它，它相对没有基础，漂浮在你上方，被意志之风和潜意识专注与需求的力量所移动、塑造和引导。
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: These "other," reinterpreted world views form a matrix from which new creativity emerges. The same thing applies in more mundane endeavors in ordinary life. For example: You may be in a predicament that seems beyond solving. It may be highly individual, since it is yours. It is unique, and has happened in no other way before. No one else has viewed your particular dilemma through your eyes, yet others have been in similar situations, solved the challenges involved, and gone on to greater creativity and fulfillment. If you can momentarily abandon your private world view, that focus from which you experience reality, then you can allow the experience of others who have had similar challenges to color your perception. You can tune in to their solutions and apply them to your particular circumstances. You often do this unconsciously. I do not want you to think, then, that such occurrences work only in esoteric terms.
quotes.translation: 这些“其他”的、重新诠释的世界观形成了一个矩阵，新的创造力从中涌现。同样的事情也适用于日常生活中更平凡的追求。例如：你可能陷入一个看似无法解决的困境。它可能高度个人化，因为是你的。它是独特的，以前从未以其他方式发生过。没有人通过你的眼睛看待你特定的困境，但其他人曾处于类似情况，解决了所涉及的挑战，并走向更大的创造力和满足。如果你能暂时放弃你的私人世界观，即你体验实相的那个焦点，那么你可以让其他经历过类似挑战的人的经验来影响你的感知。你可以调谐到他们的解决方案，并将其应用于你的特定情况。你经常无意识地这样做。那么，我不希望你认为这类事件只以深奥的方式运作。
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Puberty comes at a certain time, triggered by deep mechanisms that are related to the state of the natural world, the condition of the species, and those cultural beliefs that in a certain sense you transpose upon the natural world. In other respects, your cultural environment is of course natural. The time that puberty comes varies, then, and afterwards it is possible to parent a child. A time then comes when the period is over. During what is called the sexually active time; the larger dimensions of personhood become strictly narrowed into sexually stereotyped roles -- and all aspects of identity that do not fit are ignored or denied. The fact is that few people fit those roles. They are largely the result of the interpretations of religion as conventionally understood. And the scientists, for all their seeming independence, often simply found new intellectually acceptable reasons for unconsciously held emotional beliefs.
quotes.translation: 青春期在特定时间到来，由与自然世界状态、物种状况以及你在某种意义上转置于自然世界的文化信念相关的深层机制触发。在其他方面，你的文化环境当然是自然的。因此，青春期到来的时间各不相同，之后就有可能生育孩子。然后，一个时期结束的时刻到来。在所谓的性活跃时期，人格的更大维度被严格地窄化为性刻板角色——所有不适合的身份方面都被忽视或否认。事实上，很少有人适合这些角色。它们很大程度上是传统理解的宗教解释的结果。而科学家们，尽管看似独立，却常常只是为无意识持有的情感信念找到了新的、理智上可接受的理由。
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Any true psychic development of personality, however, is bound to lead to an understanding of the nature of the psyche that is far too large for any such confusion of basic identity with sexuality. The concept of reincarnation itself clearly shows the change of sexual orientation, and the existence of a self that is apart from its sexual orientation, even while it is also expressed through a given sexual stance. To a good extent, sexual beliefs are responsible for the blocking-out of reincarnational awareness. Such "memory" would necessarily acquaint you with experiences most difficult to correlate with your current sexual roles. Those other-sex existences are present to the psyche unconsciously. They are a portion of your personality. In so specifically identifying with your sex, therefore, you also inhibit memories that might limit or destroy that identification.
quotes.translation: 然而，任何真正的人格灵性发展，都必然导致对心灵本质的理解，这种理解远大于任何将基本身份与性混淆的情况。转世概念本身清楚地显示了性取向的变化，以及一个独立于其性取向的自我的存在，即使它也通过特定的性立场来表达。在很大程度上，性信念是阻碍转世意识的原因。这种“记忆”必然会让你熟悉那些最难与你当前性角色相关联的经验。那些异性的存在无意识地存在于心灵中。它们是你人格的一部分。因此，在如此具体地认同你的性别时，你也抑制了可能限制或破坏这种认同的记忆。
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Much of this is difficult to explain, again, for information and knowledge is constantly transformed -- almost completely reborn, so to speak, through characteristics that are inherently a part of thought itself. Knowledge is changed automatically through the auspices of each consciousness who perceives it. It is magnified and yet refined. It is a constant language, yet one that transforms itself. When I "attend these sessions," or "speak," then I exchange with others a more complicated system of reality than any computer could handle. You do not understand or perceive the ways in which your reality contributes to the foundation of the mass-world reality that you experience. Unconsciously, each individual participates in forming that world. In my case, however, I am aware of the same kind of activities, only in regard to many realities rather than one.2
quotes.translation: 这些内容大多难以解释，因为信息和知识不断被转化——可以说，通过思想本身固有的特性，它们几乎被彻底重塑。每个感知知识的意识都会自动改变知识。知识被放大，同时又被精炼。它是一种恒常的语言，却又不断自我转化。当我“参与这些课程”或“说话”时，我与他人交换的现实系统比任何计算机能处理的都要复杂得多。你不理解或感知不到你的现实如何为你所体验的群体世界现实奠定基础。无意识地，每个人都在参与构建那个世界。然而，就我而言，我意识到同样的活动，只是涉及许多现实，而非仅一个。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Once scientists theorized the ether as the medium in which the physical universe existed.1 Framework 2 is the psychological medium in which the consciousness of the world exists. The word "ego" is much bandied about, and in many circles it has a poor reputation. It is, however, as I use it, a term meant to express the ordinarily conscious directive portion of the self. It is your conscious version of what you are -- an excellent description, if I do say so myself (with amusement). It is directed outward into the physical world. It is also aware, however, of some of your "unconscious" activities. It is the you you identify with, so it is as aware of your dreams, for example, as you are, and it is quite conscious of the fact that its existence rests upon knowledge that it does not itself possess.
quotes.translation: 科学家曾假设以太是物理宇宙存在的媒介。架构二是世界意识存在的心理媒介。“自我”这个词被广泛使用，在许多圈子里名声不佳。然而，正如我所使用的，它是一个术语，旨在表达自我通常有意识的那部分指导性部分。它是你对自己有意识的版本——如果我可以这么说的话，这是一个极好的描述（带着调侃）。它向外指向物理世界。然而，它也意识到你的一些“无意识”活动。它是你认同的那个你，所以它同样意识到你的梦境，例如，就像你一样，并且它很清楚它的存在依赖于它自身并不拥有的知识。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: So far in our discussion, then, we have an inner self, dwelling primarily in a mental or psychic dimension, dreaming itself into physical form, and finally forming a body consciousness. To that body consciousness the inner self gives "its own body of physical knowledge," the vast reservoir of physical achievement that it has triumphantly produced. (Pause.) The body consciousness is not "unconscious," but for working purposes in your terms, [the body] possesses its own system of consciousness that to some extent, now (underlined), is separated from what you think of as your own normal consciousness. The body's consciousness is hardly to be considered less than your own, or as inferior to that of your inner self, since it represents knowledge from the inner self, and is a part of the inner self's own consciousness--the part delegated to the body.
quotes.translation: 到目前为止，在我们的讨论中，我们有一个内在自己，主要居住在心智或心灵维度中，将自己梦入物理形态，最终形成一个身体意识。内在自己将“它自己的物理知识体”赋予那个身体意识——它胜利地产生的巨大物理成就宝库。（停顿。）身体意识并非“无意识”，但为了在你的术语中便于运作，[身体]拥有它自己的意识系统，在某种程度上，现在（强调）与你认为的你自己正常意识分离。身体意识绝不应被视为低于你的意识，或低于你内在自己的意识，因为它代表了来自内在自己的知识，并且是内在自己意识的一部分——被委派给身体的那部分。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: (With emphasis:) In a matter of speaking (underlined), the birds and the insects are indeed living portions of the earth flying, even as, again in a matter of speaking (in parentheses) (with a smile and again with an emphasis upon the word "matter"), bears and wolves and cows and cats represent the earth turning itself into creatures that live upon its own surface. And in a matter of speaking, again, man becomes the earth thinking, and thinking his own thoughts, man in his way specializes in the conscious work of the world--a work that is dependent upon the indispensable "unconscious" work of the rest of nature, a nature that sustains him (all very intently). And when he thinks, man thinks for the microbes, for the atoms and the molecules, for the smallest particles within his being, for the insects and for the rocks, for the creatures of the sky and the air and the oceans.
quotes.translation: （强调地说）可以说（强调），鸟类和昆虫确实是地球飞翔的活生生的部分，正如，再次可以说（括号内）（带着微笑，再次强调“物质”一词），熊、狼、牛和猫代表地球将自己转化为在其表面生活的生物。而再次可以说，人类成为地球在思考，思考他自己的思想，人类以自己的方式专精于世界的有意识工作——一项依赖于自然界其余部分不可或缺的“无意识”工作的工作，自然界支撑着他（非常专注地）。而当人类思考时，他为微生物、为原子和分子、为他存在中最微小的粒子、为昆虫和岩石、为天空、空气和海洋的生物而思考。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The same still applies, though often dreams themselves are forgotten. Instead, for example, for news or for advice you watch your morning television news, which provides you with a kind of manufactured dream that to some extent technologically serves the same purpose. Instead of sending cameramen and newspaper people to the farthest corners of the earth, early man sent out aspects of himself to gather the news and to form it into dream dramas. Oftentimes much of the material did not need to become conscious: It was "unconsciously" acted upon, turned directly into action. Now such dreams simply act as backup systems, rising to the fore whenever they are needed. Their purpose was and is to increase the value fulfillment of the species and of the individual.
quotes.translation: 同样的情况仍然适用，尽管梦境本身常常被遗忘。相反，例如，为了获取新闻或建议，你观看早间电视新闻，这为你提供了一种人造的梦境，在某种程度上技术上服务于相同的目的。早期人类没有派遣摄像师和报社记者到地球最遥远的角落，而是派出自己的各个方面去收集新闻，并将其形成梦境戏剧。很多时候，许多材料不需要变得有意识：它们被“无意识地”采取行动，直接转化为行动。现在，这样的梦境只是作为备用系统，在需要时浮现出来。它们的目的过去是，现在仍然是，增加物种和个体的价值完成。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The part that translates inner data sifts it down through the subconscious, which is a barrier and also a threshold to the present personality as it operates on the camouflage plane. I have mentioned many times how vitality changes as it approaches and forms various planes. I have said that the topmost part of the subconscious contains personal memories. That beneath these are racial memories and so forth. Things are simply not layered in the way I speak of them. But continuing with the necessary analogy, on the other side of （or beneath to you） the racial memories, you no longer exist within your plane, and look out upon another with the face of this other self-conscious part of you. This part receives inner data, is in contact with the entity, to some greater degree than you are in contact with your dreams, and actually directs all the important functions that you think are either automatically controlled, or unconsciously controlled.
quotes.translation: 翻译内在数据的那部分将其筛选通过潜意识，潜意识是一个屏障，也是当前人格在伪装平面上运作时的门槛。我曾多次提到活力在接近和形成各个平面时如何变化。我曾说过，潜意识的最上层包含个人记忆。在这些之下是种族记忆等等。事物并非像我所描述的那样分层。但继续用必要的类比，在种族记忆的另一边（或对你而言之下），你不再存在于你的平面内，而是用你这另一个自我意识部分的面孔向外看向另一个平面。这部分接收内在数据，与存有接触，其程度比你与你的梦境接触更大，并且实际上指导所有你认为要么自动控制、要么无意识控制的重要功能。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: These dreams go unrecognized by the conscious ego; but they do not go unrecorded by the inner self, and they therefore exist, and they form electromagnetic channels of their own to which--make that by which--the physical body itself is affected. The physical organism is constantly changed by all stimuli, whether or not the ego is aware of the stimuli. And it is affected by stimuli, whether or not science realizes that the particular stimuli even exists. Therefore, the physical organism reacts to this continuous unconscious Mental activity in the form of continuing dream experiences, whether or not the individual is awake or asleep. All of these realities go into the formation of the personality, and unless they are all understood the personality itself will remain a mystery.
quotes.translation: 这些梦不被有意识的自我所识别；但它们确实被内在自我记录下来，因此它们存在，并形成自己的电磁通道——身体本身正是通过这些通道受到影响。无论自我是否意识到刺激，生理有机体都不断被所有刺激所改变。而且，无论科学是否认识到特定刺激的存在，它都会受到刺激的影响。因此，无论个体是醒着还是睡着，生理有机体都会以持续梦体验的形式，对这种持续的无意识心智活动做出反应。所有这些实相都参与人格的形成，除非它们全部被理解，否则人格本身将始终是个谜。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Those in your system are relatively impatient, have decided to work with large amounts of energy. Your physical system itself rapidly responds and mirrors the use of this energy. Results are seen quickly. Large groupings and regroupings occur within the mass psyche, huge waves of energy as the race makes important decisions. All of this is done on an unconscious basis, but as a teaching method the results must be seen physically. Because you respond as physical creatures you respond best of all to tangible physical results. You do not know how far you can go in any given waves of activity until you see it objectified, or nearly so. If you knew how to handle energy effectively, if you fully realized that your thoughts were the motivating factor, were the realities, then you would not need a physical existence, for that is the reason for the physical environment.
quotes.translation: 你们系统中的那些人相对急躁，决定与大量能量合作。你们的物质系统本身迅速响应并反映这种能量的使用。结果很快显现。在群体心灵内发生着大规模的分组与重组，如同种族做出重要决定时产生的巨大能量波。这一切都在无意识基础上进行，但作为教学方法，结果必须被物质性地看到。因为你们作为物质生物做出反应，你们对具体物质结果的反应最为有效。在任何特定的活动浪潮中，你们直到看到它被客观化——或近乎客观化——才知道自己能走多远。如果你们知道如何有效处理能量，如果你们完全意识到你们的想法是驱动因素、是实相，那么你们就不需要物质存在，因为那正是物质环境存在的原因。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: First of all, the unconscious is not a sponge, indiscriminately accepting material regardless of the considerations of your conscious self. All beliefs or suggestions are first sifted through your conscious mind, and only those that you accept are then permitted their penetration into the other areas of the self.
quotes.translation: 首先，无意识并非一块海绵，不顾你们有意识自我的考量而盲目接受材料。所有信念或建议首先通过你们有意识的心智进行筛选，只有你们接受的那些才被允许渗透到自我的其他领域。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Your ideas of sexuality follow both your religions and your sciences, then, for you have created each. But you always know what you are doing, and there are cycles in the earth, and in your being and your soul. And so you are in the process of reuniting yourself, and discovering what the word "humanity" means. You are finding out the meaning of individuality, which is a far more important word than you realize, and when you understand that meaning, then your own individuality will express itself in its natural form. Regardless of what words are put upon your experience in terms of sexual roles, you will be a full human being. When the conscious and the unconscious minds are understood, you will have no more problems with sexuality.
quotes.translation: 你们对性的观念既遵循你们的宗教也遵循你们的科学，因为你们创造了这两者。但你们始终知道自己正在做什么，在地球、在你们的存在和灵魂中存在着周期。因此，你们正处于重新整合自我、发现"人性"一词含义的过程中。你们正在发现个体性的意义——这是一个远比你们意识到的更重要的词——当你们理解那个含义时，你们的个体性将以自然形式表达自己。无论你们的经验被赋予何种关于性别角色的词语，你们都将成为完整的人。当有意识和无意识心智被理解时，你们将不再有性方面的问题。
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In your terms, obviously, atoms do not dream of cats chasing dogs, yet (intently) there are indeed "lapses" from physical focus that are analogous to your dreaming state. Give us a moment ... In those conditions the atoms pursue their own probable activities, and indeed make astounding calculations, bringing into your actuality the necessary probable actions to insure official life forms. But neither are they limited otherwise, for their other probable directions are also actualized. Period. On different levels in the dream state, then, you are also subjectively aware of other probable realities. Your conscious intent is unconsciously brought into the dreaming condition, and that intent helps you sort the data. (See Note 4.)
quotes.translation: 从你们的角度来看，显然原子不会梦见猫追狗，然而（专注地）确实存在与你们做梦状态类似的"脱离"物质焦点的情况。请稍等……在这些条件下，原子追求它们自己的可能活动，并确实进行惊人的计算，将必要的可能行动带入你们的实相，以确保官方生命形式。但它们也不受其他限制，因为它们其他的可能方向也同样被实现了。句号。因此，在梦状态的不同层次上，你们也主观地意识到其他可能的实相。你们有意识的意图被无意识地带入做梦状态，而那个意图帮助你们整理数据。（见注4。）
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The nature of basic reality is known according to the degree to which it is directly experienced, and it can only be directly experienced through the use of the inner senses. The inner senses are of course utilized on your plane, as on any other, constantly. Without any such use no existence would be possible. And without the unconscious and constant use of the inner senses you could not even construct your precious camouflage patterned universe.
quotes.translation: 基本实相的性质根据其被直接体验的程度而被知晓，而它只能通过使用内在感官被直接体验。内在感官当然在你们层面——如同在任何其他层面——被持续使用。没有这样的使用，任何存在都不可能。没有无意识且持续地使用内在感官，你们甚至无法构建你们珍贵的伪装模式宇宙。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: At that level environment, creatures, and the elements of the natural world are all united--a point we will return to quite often. Your intellect as you think of it operates so clearly and precisely, so logically (with amusement), sometimes so arrogantly, because the intellect rides that great thrust of codified, "ancient," "unconscious" power--the power of instant knowing that is a characteristic of the body consciousness (all very intently).
quotes.translation: 在那个层面，环境、生物和自然界的元素都融为一体——这一点我们会经常提及。你所认为的智力之所以运作得如此清晰精确、如此合乎逻辑（带着戏谑），有时甚至如此傲慢，是因为智力驾驭着那股被编码的、"古老的"、"无意识的"巨大力量——即身体意识所特有的瞬间知晓之力（说得非常专注）。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: "It is the adult's version of childhood knowledge, the human version of the animals' knowledge, the conscious version of 'unconscious' comprehension. I told you that Frameworks 1 and 2 were actually united. They seemed to be so disunited that it is almost impossible to discuss them using any other terms. To understand that much alone, to comprehend the simple idea of Framework 2's indisputable existence is strongly important, however."
quotes.translation: "这是童年知识的成人版本，动物知识的人类版本，'无意识'理解的有意识版本。我告诉过你，架构一和架构二实际上是统一的。它们看起来如此不统一，以至于几乎不可能用其他术语来讨论。然而，仅理解这一点，仅理解架构二无可争议存在的简单概念，就极为重要。"
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Despite this, I'm aware of the fact that I was necessary to the production of Seth's book. He needs my ability with words; even, I think, my turn of mind. Certainly my writing training aids in the translation of his material and helps give it form, no matter how unconsciously this is done. Certain personality characteristics are important too, I imagine -- the agility with which I can switch the focus of my consciousness, for example.
quotes.translation: 尽管如此，我意识到自己对赛斯书的产生是必要的。他需要我的文字能力；甚至，我认为，需要我的思维方式。当然，我的写作训练有助于翻译他的资料，并帮助赋予其形式，无论这是多么无意识地完成的。我想，某些人格特质也很重要——例如，我能够灵活地切换意识焦点。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: If this happens, all kinds of old and new religious denominations will war, and all kinds of ideologies surface. This need not take place, for the conscious mind -- basically, now -- having learned to focus in physical terms, is meant to expand, to accept unconscious intuitions and knowledge, and to organize these deeply creative principles into cultural patterns.
quotes.translation: 如果发生这种情况，各种新旧宗教派别将会争斗，各种意识形态将会浮现。这不必发生，因为有意识的心智——基本上，现在——已经学会聚焦于物质层面，其本意是要扩展，接纳无意识的直觉和知识，并将这些深具创造性的原理组织成文化模式。
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Creativity connects waking and dreaming reality, and is in itself a threshold in which the waking and dreaming selves merge to form constructs that belong equally to each reality. You cannot begin to understand how you form the physical events of your lives unless you understand the connections between creativity, dreams, play, and those events that form your waking hours. In one respect dreams are a kind of structured unconscious play. Your mind dreams in joyful pleasure at using itself, freed from the concerns of practical living. Dreams are the mind's free play. The spontaneous activity, however, is at the same time training in the art of forming practical events.
quotes.translation: 创造力连接清醒与梦境现实，它本身就是一个门槛，在其中清醒与做梦的自我融合，形成同时属于两个现实的构造。除非你理解创造力、梦境、游戏与构成你清醒时光的那些事件之间的联系，否则你无法开始理解你如何形成生活中的物质事件。从某个方面来说，梦境是一种结构化的无意识游戏。你的心智在愉悦地运用自身中做梦，摆脱了实际生活的顾虑。梦境是心智的自由游戏。然而，这种自发活动同时也是形成实际事件的艺术训练。
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: All of this happens because the inner portions of your being operate spontaneously, joyfully, freely; all of this occurs because your inner self believes in you, often even while you do not believe in it. These unconscious portions of your being operate amazingly well, frequently despite the greatest misunderstanding on your part of their nature and function, and in the face of strong interference from you because of your beliefs.
quotes.translation: 这一切之所以发生，是因为你存在的内在部分自发地、喜悦地、自由地运作；这一切之所以发生，是因为你的内在自我信任你，即使在你常常不信任它的时候。你存在的这些无意识部分运作得惊人地好，尽管你常常对其本质和功能有着最大的误解，并且面对你因信念而产生的强烈干扰。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: He makes a good point, saying that the ego cannot know unconscious material directly. He does not realize however, nor do your other psychologists, what I have told you often --that there is an inner ego; and it is this inner ego that organizes what Jung would call unconscious material.
quotes.translation: 他说得很有道理，指出自我无法直接认知无意识材料。然而他并不明白——你的其他心理学家也不明白——我常告诉你们的：存在一个内在自我；正是这个内在自我在组织荣格所谓的无意识材料。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: (11:21.) The individuals alive at such a time will also have a hand in such decisions, however. Once more, because you are self-conscious beings your beliefs regulate your reality. An animal knows unconsciously that it is unique and has a place in the scheme of being. Its sense of grace is built-in. Your free will allows for the freedom of any belief, including one that says you are unworthy, with no right to your existence.
quotes.translation: （11点21分）不过，活在那个时代的个体也会参与这些决定。再说一次，因为你们是有自我意识的存在，你们的信念调节着你们的实相。动物无意识地知道自己是独特的，并且在存在架构中占有一席之地。它的优雅感是与生俱来的。你们的自由意志允许任何信念的自由，包括那种说你们毫无价值、没有生存权利的信念。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Like the entire American hostage affair (in Iran), any physical event serves as a focus that attracts all of its probable versions and outcomes. The hostage situation (now in day 53) is a materialized mass dream, meant to be important and vital on political and religious platforms of reality, meant to dramatize a conflict of beliefs, and to project that conflict outward into the realm of public knowledge. Everyone involved was consciously and unconsciously a willing participant at the most basic levels of human behavior, and it is of course no coincidence that 1980 is immediately foreshadowed by that event. What will the world do with it?
quotes.translation: 就像整个美国人质事件（在伊朗），任何物理事件都作为一个焦点，吸引它所有可能的版本和结果。人质事件（现已进入第53天）是一个物质化的集体梦，旨在政治和宗教的实相平台上具有重要性和活力，旨在戏剧化地呈现信念冲突，并将那冲突向外投射到公共知识的领域。每个参与者在人类行为的最基本层面上，都是有意识和无意识的自愿参与者，1980年由该事件立即预示，当然绝非巧合。世界将如何应对它？
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is indeed quite time for us to discuss the true nature and reality of what is so loosely called suggestion. We have indeed spoken much concerning the focus of energy, and a sufferer is truly entranced with the idea of his illness, and it is only this which basically allows the illness to continue. He focuses upon it both consciously and unconsciously.
quotes.translation: 现在确实是时候讨论所谓暗示的真正本质和实相了。我们确实已经谈论了很多关于能量焦点的问题，而一个受苦者确实沉迷于他疾病的观念，正是这一点从根本上允许疾病持续。他有意识和无意识地专注于它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now because your conscious mind, as you think of it, is not aware of these activities, you do not identify with this inner portion of yourselves. You prefer to identify with the part of you who watches television or cooks or works -- the part you think knows what it is doing. But this seemingly unconscious portion of yourself is far more knowledgeable, and upon its smooth functioning your entire physical existence depends.
quotes.translation: 现在，因为你们所认为的意识心并不知晓这些活动，你们不认同自己的这个内在部分。你们更愿意认同那个看电视、做饭或工作的部分——那个你们认为知道自己在做什么的部分。但你们这个看似无意识的部分要博学得多，你们整个物质存在都依赖于它的平稳运作。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The experiences at these various levels may be interpreted symbolically. They may appear in the form of fantasy, fiction, or art work, without the conscious self realizing their origin. Now at any of these various stages of consciousness, other phenomena may also be perceived -- thought-forms for example, energy manifestations, projections from the personal subconscious, and projections from the collective unconscious. Any or all of these may take symbolic form, and may appear beneficial or threatening according to the attitude of the personality involved. They should be regarded as quite natural phenomena, often neutral in intent.
quotes.translation: 这些不同层面的经验可能被象征性地诠释。它们可能以幻想、小说或艺术作品的形式出现，而意识自我却不知其起源。现在，在这些不同的意识阶段中，也可能感知到其他现象——例如思想形态、能量显化、个人潜意识的投射，以及集体无意识的投射。这些中的任何一个或全部都可能采取象征形式，并且根据所涉及人格的态度，可能显得有益或具有威胁性。它们应被视为相当自然的现象，其意图通常是中性的。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is equipped, as an animal is, to perform beautifully in its environment. You would call it mindless, since it would seem not to reason. For the purpose of this discussion alone, imagine a body with a fully operating body consciousness, not diseased for any reason or defective by birth, but one without the overriding ego-directed consciousness that you have. There have been species of such a nature. In your terms they would seem to be like sleepwalkers, yet their physical abilities surpassed yours. They were indeed as agile as animals -- nor were they unconscious.10 They simply dealt with a different kind of awareness.
quotes.translation: 它像动物一样，天生就能在其环境中完美运作。你会称它为无心智的，因为它似乎不会推理。仅就本次讨论而言，想象一个拥有完全运作的身体意识的身体，没有任何疾病或先天缺陷，但没有你所拥有的那种主导性的自我导向意识。曾有物种具有这种性质。用你们的说法，它们看起来像梦游者，但它们的身体能力却超越你们。它们确实像动物一样敏捷——而且它们并非无意识。它们只是处理着一种不同的觉知。
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: When women give birth in a crowded world they also know, and with a portion of their conscious minds, that a violation is involved. When your species sees that it is destroying other species and disrupting the natural balance, then it is consciously aware of its violation. When such natural guilt is not faced there are other mechanisms that must be employed. Again at the risk of repeating myself: Many of your problems result from the fact that you do not accept the responsibility of your own consciousness. It is meant to assess the reality that is unconsciously formed in direct replica of your thoughts and expectations.
quotes.translation: 当女性在一个拥挤的世界中分娩时，她们也知道，并且用她们意识心智的一部分知道，这涉及一种侵犯。当你们的物种看到它正在毁灭其他物种并破坏自然平衡时，那么它就有意识地意识到它的侵犯。当这种自然的内疚不被面对时，就必须采用其他机制。再次冒着重复的风险：你们的许多问题源于这样一个事实：你们不接受自己意识的责任。它本应评估那无意识形成的、直接复制你们思想和期望的现实。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: "Man thinks of acts, for example, and acting and doing, but he does not identify himself with those inner processes that make acting and doing possible. He identifies with what he thinks of as his logical thought, and the abilities of reasoning. These seem to suggest that he possesses an elegant, cool separation from nature, that the animals for example do not. He does not identify, again, with the processes that make his logical thinking possible. Those processes are spontaneous and 'unconscious,' so it appears that anything outside of his conscious control must be undisciplined or chaotic, and lacking in all logic.
quotes.translation: “例如，人想到行为、行动和作为，但他并不认同于那些使行动和作为成为可能的内在过程。他认同于他认为是逻辑思维和推理能力的东西。这些似乎暗示他拥有一种优雅、冷静的与自然的分离，例如动物就没有。他再次不认同于那些使他逻辑思维成为可能的过程。那些过程是自发且‘无意识’的，所以看起来任何在他意识控制之外的东西都必定是无纪律或混乱的，并且缺乏所有逻辑。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now: Man has a far greater leeway. He forms his reality according to his conscious beliefs, even while its basis lies in the deep unconscious nature of the earth in corporeal terms. Man's "I am," [seemingly] apart from nature -- a characteristic necessary for the development of his kind of consciousness -- led him into value judgments, and also necessitated some break with the deep inner certainties of other species.
quotes.translation: 现在：人拥有远为更大的回旋余地。他根据他有意识的信念形成他的现实，即使其基础在于地球的深层无意识本质（以物质形式而言）。人的“我是”（看似）与自然分离——这是发展他那种意识所必需的特性——导致他进入价值判断，也必然造成与其他物种深层内在确定性的某种决裂。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Many times such constructions are used as inner visual patterns, for example. Visually they often bear a similarity to the inner architecture of the cells, and to planets. Your dream images are biologically structured, then. The experiences behind them bring you in contact with the deepest portions of your nonphysical reality, and it is the unconscious who translates these for you into recognizable images and forms.
quotes.translation: 许多时候，这样的建构被用作内在视觉模式，例如。视觉上，它们常常与细胞的内在结构以及行星相似。那么，你们的梦境意象在生物学上是有结构的。它们背后的经验使你们接触到你们非物质实相的最深层部分，而正是无意识将这些翻译成你们可识别的意象和形式。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The patterns evolve according to certain laws. They merely reflect the ideas behind them, and these ideas you must realize originate from different sources. They originate in the subconscious, it is true, but before this an idea quality is received by the inner senses. Sometimes this idea quality is received as intuition, where it sparks into the conscious mind. But the conscious ego is the primary manipulator of camouflage patterns and the obvious mover. The actual material from which camouflage patterns are formed is the vitality which exists and which is unconsciously used by your personalities.
quotes.translation: 这些模式根据某些法则演化。它们仅仅反映其背后的理念，而你们必须认识到这些理念源自不同的源头。它们确实源自潜意识，但在此之前，一种理念品质被内在感官接收。有时这种理念品质作为直觉被接收，在那里它火花般闪入意识心智。但意识自我是伪装模式的主要操纵者和明显的推动者。形成伪装模式的实际材料是存在的活力，它被你们的人格无意识地使用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Many of your misconceptions about the nature of reality are directly related to the division you place between your sleeping and waking experience, your conscious and unconscious activity. Opposites seem to occur that do not exist in actuality. Myths, symbols and rationalizations all become necessary to explain the seeming divergences, the seeming contradictions between realities that appear to be so different.
quotes.translation: 你们对实相本质的许多误解，直接源于你们将睡梦与清醒体验、意识与无意识活动截然二分。看似对立的矛盾实则并不存在。神话、象征与合理化解释都成了必要工具，用以调和那些看似迥异的实相之间显现的歧异与矛盾。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: This is a good deal of accomplishment in seven years for any personality, regardless of its status. For a nonphysical personality, it is astonishing indeed. To ascribe all of this activity to a figment of the unconscious seems rather much. (In the same amount of time I've published two books, finished another, and begun a fourth. I mention this to show that Seth hasn't been absorbing any of my own creativity.)
quotes.translation: 对任何人格而言，无论其存在状态如何，七年内达成如此成就已属非凡。对非肉身人格而言，这确实令人惊叹。将所有这些活动归因于无意识的幻影似乎有些牵强。（在同一段时间里，我出版了两本书，完成了另一本，并开始了第四本。我提及这点是为了说明赛斯并未吸收我自身的任何创造力。）
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: For now consider this blocked energy. Consciously, most people are already afraid of it -- they did not repress it because they considered it good. When I use the word "repressed" I do not mean forgotten, or shoved into the unconscious, or beyond reach. You may pretend that such material is hidden but it is quite within your conscious awareness. You have only to honestly look for it and organize what you find.
quotes.translation: 暂且将此视为受阻的能量。在意识层面，多数人早已对其心怀恐惧——他们压抑它并非因其良善。当我使用"压抑"一词时，并非指遗忘、推入无意识或遥不可及。你们或许假装这类材料已被隐藏，但它始终存在于你们的意识觉知中。只需诚实地寻找并整理所发现之物即可。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Such usually unconscious knowledge is of great benefit to the species itself, so that at certain levels, at least, the knowledge of the species is not imprisoned within any given generation at once, but flows or circulates within the overall larger reincarnational picture. Probabilities are very much involved here, of course, and it is easier for particular events to fall within one time sequence than another.
quotes.translation: 这类通常属于无意识的知识对物种本身大有裨益，因此至少在特定层面上，物种的知识不会囿于任何单一世代，而是在整体轮回的宏大图景中流动循环。当然，或然性在此扮演重要角色，特定事件更容易落入某个时间序列而非其他序列。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It cuts you off from the spontaneous give-and-take of conscious and unconscious material mentioned earlier (in this session), and of itself you see necessitates certain changes that then make your prolonged sleep period necessary (intently). The body is denied the frequent rests it requires. Conscious stimuli is over-applied, making assimilation difficult and placing a strain upon the mind-body relationship.
quotes.translation: 这切断了你们与先前（本次课程中）所述意识与无意识材料之间自发交流的通道，由此必然引发某些改变，进而使延长睡眠期成为必要（专注地）。身体被剥夺了所需的频繁休息。意识刺激过度施加，导致同化困难并给身心关系带来压力。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: You know then from past discussions that the dream world as you know it is the result of your awareness of a plane of existence which you help create, and in which you manipulate. In other words, on an unconscious level you here manipulate in another plane of existence entirely, one in which your conscious camouflage ego may not enter.
quotes.translation: 根据过往讨论你们已知，你们所认知的梦境世界，是你们对自身参与创造并运作的某个存在层面的觉知结果。换言之，在无意识层面，你们在此完全不同的另一个存在层面运作，而你们有意识的伪装自我无法进入其中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Time overlays are the time versions of certain events, then. These time overlays always exist. (Pause.) They may become activated, however, by certain associations made in your present, and therefore draw into your present time some glimpses either from the future or the past. So-called present time is thickened, then, by a psychological realization on deep levels of the psyche that all events are interrelated, and that the reincarnational experiences of any given individual provide a rich source of experience from which each person at least unconsciously draws.
quotes.translation: 时间叠层是特定事件的时间版本。这些时间叠层始终存在。（停顿。）然而，它们可能因你当下所做的某些联想而被激活，从而将来自未来或过去的一瞥带入你的当下。所谓的当下时间因此被加厚，这是通过心灵深层对一切事件相互关联的心理认知实现的，而任何个体的转世经历都提供了丰富的经验源泉，每个人至少会无意识地从中汲取。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now: I am, as I have told you often myself, independent of Ruburt. As you know there are connections between us.* He does not understand as yet the true nature of his own creativity. Few people do. There are always psychological reasons for all such phenomena -- for any phenomena at all. In some respects of course Ruburt's children are his books. His psyche is enormously creative. Part of what I seem to be as I speak through him is as deeply and unconsciously a phenomenon as the birth of a child would be. In a different way so is Oversoul 7 as he thinks of it.
quotes.translation: 现在：正如我常对你说的，我本身独立于鲁柏。如你所知，我们之间存在联系。*他尚未理解自身创造力的真实本质。很少有人能做到这一点。所有此类现象——任何现象——总有心理层面的原因。当然，在某些方面，鲁柏的孩子就是他的著作。他的心灵具有极大的创造力。我通过他说话时所呈现的部分特质，就像婴儿诞生一样，是一种深刻而无意识的现象。从不同角度来看，他所构想的"超灵七号"也是如此。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: In daily practical experience, try to concentrate for a while upon seemingly subordinate abilities, ones that you think of as latent. If you do so consistently, using your imagination and will, then those abilities will become prominent in your present. The current beliefs will reprogram and alter past experience. It is not simply that past, forgotten, unconsciously perceived events will be put together in a new way and organized under a new heading, but that in that past (now not perceivable), the entire bodily response to seemingly past events will change.
quotes.translation: 在日常实际经验中，试着暂时专注于看似次要的能力——那些你认为处于潜伏状态的能力。如果你持续这样做，运用你的想象力和意志，那么这些能力将在你的当下变得突出。当前的信念会重新编程并改变过去的经验。这不仅仅是过去被遗忘、无意识感知的事件会以新方式重组并归入新类别，而是在那个（现在不可感知的）过去中，整个身体对看似过去事件的反应都会改变。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Thou shalt not violate against nature, life, or the earth. In your terms creaturehood, while striving for survival and longing for life, while abundant and rambunctious, is not inherently gluttonous. It follows the unconscious order that is within it even as there is a definite order, relationship and limit to the number of chromosomes. A cell that becomes omnivorous can destroy the life of the body.
quotes.translation: 你不可违背自然、生命或大地。用你们的术语来说，生物性在追求生存与渴望生命时，虽然丰沛而喧闹，但本质上并非贪婪。它遵循内在的无意识秩序，正如染色体数量有其明确秩序、关联与界限。一个变得无所不食的细胞可以摧毁身体的生命。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: This actual gathering up of prime vitality for the purpose of physical construction is not however truly automatic, and it is not truly performed unconsciously. The strong self-conscious self of which I have spoken, the self-conscious self of which your own personality is not aware, this self that faces into the inner world of reality, quite consciously draws upon the vitality and stuff of what is.
quotes.translation: 然而，这种为物质构建而聚集原始生命力的行为并非真正自动，也并非真正无意识地完成。我所说的那个强大的自我意识自我——你们人格尚未察觉的那个自我意识自我——这个面向内在实相世界的自我，是相当有意识地汲取存在本身的活力与素材。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Peter [for his own reasons] may decide that his body is out to get him and punish him, rather than, say, the FBI. He may symbolically pick out an organ or a function, and he will misinterpret many body events in the same way that another may misinterpret mass events. Any public service announcements, so-called, publicizing symptoms connected with his sensitive area, will immediately alarm him. He will consciously and unconsciously focus upon that part of the body, anticipating its malfunction. Our friend can indeed alter the reality of his body.
quotes.translation: 彼得（出于他自己的原因）可能认定他的身体要与他作对并惩罚他，而非比如联邦调查局。他可能象征性地挑出一个器官或功能，并以他人可能误解大众事件的方式，误解许多身体事件。任何所谓的公共服务公告，若宣传与他敏感部位相关的症状，都会立即引起他的警觉。他会有意识且无意识地聚焦于身体那个部位，预期其功能失常。我们的朋友确实能够改变他身体的实相。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: People who wrote books against the Catholic Church were excommunicated. Ruburt transferred those fears to society at large. There was a conflict between creative work and the church even when only poetry was involved. He should indeed give himself suggestions that the necessary insights will come to him, and that the proper connections be made whether consciously or unconsciously. But the idea is that it is safe to express himself, and that the true purpose of his life is indeed to express those characteristics that compose his personal reality.
quotes.translation: 那些写书反对天主教的人都被逐出了教会。鲁柏将这些恐惧转移到了整个社会。即便只涉及诗歌创作，创造性工作与教会之间也存在冲突。他确实应该给自己暗示：必要的洞见将会到来，无论有意识还是无意识，适当的连接都会建立。但关键在于，表达自己是安全的，他生命的真正目的正是表达那些构成他个人实相的特质。
quotes.source_file: 10-10-10-10The Way Toward Health - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Einstein used the miraculous aspects of his mind. Parts of the mind are almost completely undistorted. The mind is distributed throughout the whole physical body. The mind builds up about it the physical camouflages necessary for existence on your physical plane. The mind receives data from the inner senses and forms the camouflage necessary. The mind unconsciously or unselfconsciously deals with the basic laws according to the camouflage effect that is vital for survival on your physical plane. The mind is the tool which must be used.
quotes.translation: 爱因斯坦运用了他心智的神奇面向。心智的某些部分几乎完全未被扭曲。心智遍布整个物质身体。心智在其周围构建了在你们物质层面生存所必需的物质伪装。心智接收来自内在感官的数据，并形成必要的伪装。心智无意识或不自觉地根据伪装效应处理基本法则——这对你们物质层面的生存至关重要。心智是必须使用的工具。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now in your terms only, these other counterparts are like latent patterns within your mind. Echoes. How many of you have actually thought of what the unconscious may be? Or, the voices that you hear within your mind or heart? Are they yours? To what counterparts do they belong? And yet each of you, in your own identity, has the right to do precisely as you wish, and to form your own reality....
quotes.translation: 现在仅就你们的角度而言，这些其他对应体就像你们心智中的潜在模式。回响。你们中有多少人真正思考过无意识可能是什么？或者，你们在心智或心中听到的声音？它们是你们的吗？它们属于哪些对应体？然而你们每个人，在自己的身份中，都有权完全按自己的意愿行事，并形成自己的实相……
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Each of you, again, chose your parents and environment. You spoke in your notes (two days ago) of precognition in connection with art -- an excellent point. Precognition in those terms also applies at your birth, when ahead of time you are quite aware on unconscious levels of those conditions that you will meet. You have chosen them and projected them ahead of you, out into the medium of time.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，你们每个人都选择了自己的父母和环境。你在笔记中（两天前）提到了与艺术相关的预知——这是个极佳的观点。就这些术语而言，预知也适用于你们出生之时——那时你们在无意识层面早已清楚知道自己将遭遇的状况。你们选择了它们，并将它们投射到时间媒介中，投射在你们前方。
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Even when you lost sight -- as you knew you would -- of those deep connections, they would continue to operate until, in its own way, man's consciousness could rediscover the knowledge and put it to use -- deliberately and willfully, thereby bringing that consciousness to flower. In your terms this would represent a great leap, for the egotistically aware individual would fully comprehend unconscious knowledge and act on his own, out of choice. He would become a conscious co-creator. Obviously, this has not as yet occurred.
quotes.translation: 即使当你们——正如你们知道自己会——失去对这些深层连接的觉察时，它们仍会持续运作，直到人类的意识能够以自己的方式重新发现这些知识并加以运用——有意识且有意地，从而使那意识绽放。就你们的角度而言，这将代表一次巨大飞跃，因为自我觉察的个体将完全理解无意识知识，并出于选择自主行动。他将成为有意识的共同创造者。显然，这尚未发生。
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: (11:25.) Now: When you make any important decision you automatically rouse all portions of your psyche. You set probabilities into motion. The kind of decision to some extent organizes the patterns. This should be obvious. But when you decide to move you are putting yourself in league with others who also make the same decision. Someone who moves will leave a house or an apartment vacant for someone else to move into. Unconsciously, then, the movers are in league with each other. There are sympathetic probabilities set up.
quotes.translation: （11:25）现在：当你做出任何重要决定时，你会自动唤醒你心灵的所有部分。你启动各种可能性。决定的类型在某种程度上组织着模式。这应该显而易见。但当你决定搬迁时，你是在让自己与做出同样决定的其他人为伍。搬迁者会空出房屋或公寓，供他人入住。因此，无意识中，搬迁者们彼此关联。存在着同频的可能性被建立起来。
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now any individual can pass through these levels and remain relatively untouched and unaware, can travel through them unperceiving. The overall intentions and characteristics of the personality will determine the quality of perception and understanding. The material mentioned is available in each of the levels of consciousness given, but it must be sought out, either through conscious desire or strong unconscious desire. If it is not, then the gifts available and the potentials simply remain unused and unclaimed.
quotes.translation: 任何个体都能穿越这些层次，却几乎不受影响、毫无察觉，能在其中穿行而不自知。人格的整体意图与特质将决定感知与理解的质量。前述资料在每一层意识中皆可获取，但必须通过有意识的渴望或强烈的无意识渴望去寻求。若不去寻求，那些可得的馈赠与潜能便只能闲置未用、无人认领。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It was a very good one. He used the term unconscious; and it is legitimate. For the basic earth that gives you sustenance is formed from your own vitality. When you look at the state of your world therefore, as a sign of man's condition, then also consider the stability, in your terms, and the bounty, that is also a sign of inner vitality. And this sustains you regardless of your wars.
quotes.translation: 这是个很好的说法。他用了"无意识"一词，这是合理的。因为滋养你的基本大地正是由你自身的生命力所形成。因此，当你审视世界的状态作为人类境况的征兆时，也请考量其稳定性——以你们的时间观而言——以及丰饶，这同样是内在生命力的征兆。无论你们如何征战，它始终支撑着你们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: (11:00.) Trees as they stand are a sound that, again, you do not perceive. In your dreams and particularly beyond those dreams that you recall, are areas of consciousness in which these sounds are automatically perceived and translated into visual images. They operate as a sort of shorthand. Given certain sounds, you could recreate your universe as you know it unconsciously, and any one multidimensional symbol can contain all the reality that you know. End of dictation. (Pause.) Now a few remarks.
quotes.translation: (11:00) 矗立的树木本身是一种声音，而你们同样无法感知。在你们的梦境中，尤其是在你们所记得的梦境之外，存在着意识领域，这些声音在其中被自动感知并转化为视觉影像。它们运作方式类似速记。若掌握特定声音，你便能无意识地重建你所知的宇宙，而任何一个多维象征都能包含你所知的一切实相。口授结束。（停顿）现在说几句题外话。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: There are then, obviously, probable futures and probable presents. I am trying to discuss this in your terms, since basically, you must understand, the words "past," "present," and "future" are no more meaningful as far as true experience is concerned than are the words "ego," "conscious," or "unconscious."
quotes.translation: 显然，存在着可能的未来与可能的现在。我正试图以你们的语言讨论此事，因为从根本上说，你们必须明白，"过去"、"现在"、"未来"这些词，就真实体验而言，与"自我"、"意识"或"无意识"这些词一样缺乏意义。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Quite without any inductions, you have "hypnotized" yourself into all the beliefs that you have. This simply means that you have consciously accepted them, focused upon them, excluded data to the contrary, narrowed your interests to those specific points, and accordingly activated the unconscious mechanisms that then materialize those convictions through physical experience.
quotes.translation: 完全无需任何诱导，你已将自己"催眠"进你所持的所有信念。这仅意味着你有意识地接受了它们，聚焦其上，排除了相反的数据，将兴趣局限于那些特定要点，并因此激活了无意识机制，继而通过物质体验将那些信念具体化。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: New paragraph. Those incidents are recorded unconsciously, however, if they applied to your direct experience; and under hypnosis, for example, you could make them your own. So there are different kinds of memories. You share certain biological similarities with your parents, but there are other biological groupings not understood, uniting counterparts in any given century.
quotes.translation: 新段落。然而，那些事件若与你的直接经验相关，便会无意识地记录下来；例如在催眠状态下，你便能将其据为己有。因此存在不同种类的记忆。你与父母共享某些生物相似性，但还有未被理解的生物分组，将任何特定世纪中的对应体联结在一起。
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now the inner ego is the organizer of experience that Jung would call unconscious. The inner ego is another term for what we call the inner self. As the outer ego manipulates within the environment and physical reality, so the inner ego or self organizes and manipulates within an inner reality. The inner ego creates that physical reality with which the outer ego then deals.
quotes.translation: 现在，内在自我是荣格称之为无意识的经验组织者。内在自我是我们所称的内在自性的另一个术语。正如外在自我在环境和物质实相中运作，内在自我或自性也在内在实相中组织与运作。内在自我创造了外在自我随后处理的那个物质实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Give us a moment. (Pause.) In such instances you are withdrawing your perceptive abilities from the physical body. They will seem to operate as usual, but they are more vivid and far-reaching. Your thoughts instantly attain a form that you can then perceive. If you think of a dog for example, quite unconsciously you form the image of a dog, which you do then perceive.
quotes.translation: 请稍等片刻。（停顿）在这种情况下，你正将感知能力从物质身体中撤回。它们看似照常运作，但更为鲜明且深远。你的念头会立即形成你能感知的形态。例如，若你想到一只狗，你会完全无意识地形成狗的影像，随后确实感知到它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: In larger terms there are other entire lives, which for you are forgotten essentially as yesterday is. These too, however, are a secondary series of activities, riding beneath your present primary concern. They are as unconsciously a part of your present, and as connected with it, as yesterday is.
quotes.translation: 从更宏观的角度看，还有其他完整的人生，它们对你而言本质上就像昨天一样被遗忘。然而，这些也是次要的活动序列，潜藏在你当前主要关注之下。它们如同昨天一般，无意识地成为你当下的一部分，并与当下紧密相连。
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The seemingly unconscious portions of yourself draw atoms and molecules from the air to form your image. Your lips move, your tongue speaks your name. Does the name belong to the atoms and molecules within your lips or tongue? (Pause.) The atoms and molecules move constantly, forming into cells, tissues and organs. How can the name the tongue speaks belong to them?
quotes.translation: 你表面无意识的部分从空气中汲取原子与分子，以形成你的形象。你的嘴唇翕动，舌头念出你的名字。这名字属于你唇舌间的原子与分子吗？（停顿）原子与分子不断运动，形成细胞、组织与器官。舌头所念出的名字，又如何能属于它们？
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Both groups ignore the miraculous unity of the psyche, the fine natural interworkings that exist between the so-called conscious mind and the so-called unconscious -- the incredibly rich interaction as each gives and takes.
quotes.translation: 两派都忽视了心灵那奇迹般的统一性，忽视了所谓意识心智与所谓无意识之间精妙自然的相互作用——那彼此给予与接纳时难以置信的丰富互动。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: There are traces in your present experience of your probable selves, even as there are signs in each individual of all the great talents shown and developed so flamboyantly by a few. These traces can be brought into your experience to enrich it. They do so in any case on unconscious levels, where they form the basis from which you choose your current experience.
quotes.translation: 你当前经验中存有潜在自我的痕迹，正如每个个体身上都显露出少数人如此绚烂展现与发展的所有伟大天赋的迹象。这些痕迹可以被带入你的经验中，以丰富它。无论如何，它们在无意识层面已然如此运作，构成你选择当前经验的基础。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: (11:32.) Illnesses usually represent unfaced problems, in your terms, and these dilemmas embody challenges meant to lead you to greater achievement and fulfillment. Because body and mind operate so well together, one will attempt to cure the other, and will often succeed if left alone. The organism has its own beliefs in health that are unconscious on your part.
quotes.translation: （11点32分）疾病通常代表未面对的问题，用你们的话说，这些困境蕴含着挑战，旨在引导你们走向更伟大的成就与圆满。由于身体与心智配合得天衣无缝，一方会试图治愈另一方，若不加干预往往能成功。生物体自身拥有你们意识层面无法察觉的健康信念。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Now this development helps me, for I need his development in order that my communications be more clearly presented and received. Basically however all of this takes place in deeply unconscious layers. Abilities and energies are released. These cannot be willed however, on a conscious level.
quotes.translation: 这种发展对我有所助益，因为需要他的成长才能使我的讯息更清晰传达与接收。但根本上这一切都发生在深层无意识层面。能力与能量被释放出来，然而这些无法在意识层面刻意强求。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Now, through very intense emotional focus you can create a form, and project it to another person who may then perceive it. This may be done consciously or unconsciously; and that is rather important. This discussion does not concern the so-called astral form, which is something entirely different. The physical body is the materialization of the astral form.
quotes.translation: 通过极其强烈的情感聚焦，你们可以创造出一个形态，并将其投射给他人，对方可能因此感知到它。这可以有意识或无意识地进行——这点相当重要。本次讨论不涉及所谓的星光体，那是完全不同的概念。物质身体正是星光体的具体化显现。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The fabric of the present self is interwoven with these reincarnational "pasts," and from them the present self draws unconsciously from its own bank of personality characteristics, activities, and insights. Often past-life memories come to the surface but are not recognized as such, since they appear in fantasy form, or are projected into art creations.
quotes.translation: 当下自我的结构交织着这些转世"过往"，当下自我从中无意识地汲取自身人格特质、活动与洞见的库存。前世记忆常浮现至表层却未被识别，因其以幻想形式显现，或投射为艺术创作。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The creative body consciousness creates the eye. The creative inner psyche creates the ego. The body forms the eye in the splendid wisdom of its great unconscious knowing. The psyche brings forth the ego that perceives psychologically as the eye perceives physically. Both the eye and the ego are formations focused toward perception of exterior reality.
quotes.translation: 创造性的身体意识创造了眼睛。创造性的内在心灵创造了自我。身体以其伟大无意识认知的卓越智慧塑造了眼睛。心灵催生出自我，如同眼睛进行物理感知般进行心理感知。眼睛与自我都是聚焦于外在现实感知的构造。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: It was at this point that the nature of the conscious mind itself became so misunderstood, and those unrecognized or denied powers were assigned to unconscious portions of the self by ensuing schools of psychology. (With emphasis:) Very natural functions of the conscious mind, therefore, were assigned to the "underground" and cut off from normal use.
quotes.translation: 正是在这一点上，意识心智的本质遭到严重误解，那些未被认知或否认的能力被后续心理学派系归入自我的无意识部分。（加重语气）因此，意识心智极其自然的功能被贬入"地下"，与正常运用割裂开来。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The Tubbs woman was to be given still another child, when no more were desired, by Ruburt in childish retaliation. Both literal interpretations were true, you see, but Ruburt took the opportunity （unconsciously of course） to use valid information, that of the trip, as a method of getting back for the imagined and unreasonable treachery of her friend.
quotes.translation: 当鲁柏不再想要更多孩子时，她以孩童般的报复心态，让塔布斯太太又怀了一个。你看，两种字面解释都成立，但鲁柏（当然是无意识地）利用那次旅行的有效信息，作为报复她朋友想象中不忠行为的手段。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now this leads to other adventures in which whole civilizations may be involved, for as individuals have their probable destinies, so do civilizations, nations, and inhabited planetary systems. Your historical earth as you know it has developed in many different ways, and there is a deeply unconscious connection that unites all such manifestations.
quotes.translation: 这又引向其他涉及整个文明的冒险，因为如同个体有其可能的命运，文明、国家及有人居住的星系系统也是如此。你们所知的历史地球已以许多不同方式发展，而有一种深层的无意识连接将所有这类显现统一起来。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The ego is your idea of your physical image in relation to the world. Your self image is not unconscious, then. You are quite aware of it, though often you reject certain thoughts about it in favor of others. False beliefs can result in a rigid ego that insists upon using the conscious mind in one direction only, further distorting its perceptions.
quotes.translation: 自我是你对自己与世界相关的物质形象的概念。因此，你的自我形象并非无意识的。你相当清楚它，尽管你常拒绝某些关于它的想法而偏好其他。虚假信念可能导致僵化的自我，坚持只朝一个方向使用意识心，进一步扭曲其感知。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: There have been tyrannies propagated for various reasons by the race of man upon itself. One of the greatest, however, is the idea that the conscious mind does not have any touch with the fountains of its own being, that it is divorced from nature, and that the individual is therefore at the mercy of unconscious drives over which he has no control.
quotes.translation: 人类种族曾因各种原因对自己施加暴政。其中最大的暴政之一，是认为意识心与自身存在的源泉毫无接触，认为它与自然分离，因此个体受制于自己无法控制的无意识驱力。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: At certain levels both cat and mouse understand the nature of the life energy they share, and are not -- in those terms -- jealous for their own individuality. This does not mean they will not struggle to live, but that they have a built-in unconscious sense of unity with nature in which they know they will not be lost or immersed (quietly intent).
quotes.translation: 在某个层面，猫和老鼠都了解它们共享的生命能量的本质，并且——就那些层面而言——并不嫉妒自己的个体性。这并不意味着它们不会为生存而挣扎，而是它们有一种与生俱来的与自然合一的无意识感，知道它们不会迷失或被淹没（安静而专注地）。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Used, they can help you fulfill yourself to the utmost. There is no coincidence that it is the left ear involved. You have used the symbolism of right and wrong. The right ear, the wrong ear, bothers you for you do not want to hear what you consider the bad sounds. The left ear and the left portion of the body generally also are connected with the unconscious. And the sounds are somewhat connected with your feeling toward oil paints. Do you see the connection?
quotes.translation: 若善加利用，它们能帮助你最大限度地实现自我。涉及左耳绝非巧合。你一直使用对与错的象征。右耳、错耳困扰着你，因为你不想听到你认为不好的声音。左耳及身体左侧通常也与无意识相连。而这些声音与你对油画颜料的感受有些关联。你看出这联系了吗？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Birth and death then have their function, intensifying and focusing your attention. Life seems more dear in your terms, corporeal terms, because of the existence of death. It seems, perhaps, easier to have no conscious idea of the year or time that death might occur. Unconsciously of course each man and woman knows, and yet hides the knowledge.
quotes.translation: 因此，出生与死亡自有其功能，它们强化并聚焦你的注意力。在你们看来，在肉体层面看来，生命因死亡的存在而显得更为珍贵。或许，对死亡可能发生的年份或时间毫无意识认知，反而更容易些。当然，每个男人和女人在无意识中都知道，却又隐藏着这份知识。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: It is formed by the unconscious will for reasons of its own. It is a variation on the original pattern. I intend to tie this in for you later with a clearer explanation as to how you on your plane form your own camouflage universe, and to elucidate on the fact that form is not rigid, though it appears to be in many cases on your own plane.
quotes.translation: 它是由无意识意志出于自身原因而形成的。这是原始模式的一种变体。我打算稍后为你更清晰地解释，你们如何在你们自己的层面上构建你们自己的伪装宇宙，并阐明形式并非僵化不变的事实，尽管在你们自己的层面上，许多情况下它看似如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Overall the climate of the entire establishment here has been supportive. Even the unconscious attitudes of others who have lived here have been beneficial in your behalf. You have used much of this energy to produce your own work. This does not mean that such conditions will always be necessary, but that they have served you well. (Pause.
quotes.translation: 总体而言，这里整个环境的气氛一直是支持性的。甚至其他曾住在这里的人的无意识态度，也对你们有益。你们利用了许多这种能量来创作自己的作品。这并不意味着这样的条件总是必要的，而是说它们对你们很有帮助。（停顿）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: In them of course one object may be a symbol, but there is no such thing as an overall statement of dream symbolism, in which a given symbol will have a general meaning. There are too many variations in personal experience. It is true that in dreams you do reach some of the deepest sources of your being at times, but even there, the expression of that being is far too individualistic to assign the same kind of "unconscious" meaning to overall symbols.
quotes.translation: 当然，在它们之中，一个物体可能是一个象征，但并没有所谓的梦象征主义的总体陈述，即某个特定象征会具有普遍意义。个人经验中的变数太多了。确实，在梦中，你们有时确实触及了你们存在的最深层源泉，但即使在那里，那种存在的表达也过于个性化，无法将同样的“无意识”意义赋予总体象征。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The conscious mind is basically curious, open. It is also equipped to examine its own contents. Because of the psychological theories of the last century, many Western people believed that the primary purpose of the conscious mind was to inhibit "unconscious" material.
quotes.translation: 意识心智基本上是好奇的、开放的。它也具备检视自身内容的能力。由于上个世纪的心理理论，许多西方人相信意识心智的主要目的是抑制“无意识”材料。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: As the present life of any individual rises from hidden dimensions beyond those easily accessible in physical terms, and as it draws its energy and power to act from unconscious sources, so does the present physical universe as you know it rise from other dimensions. So does it have its source, and derive its energy from deeper realities.
quotes.translation: 正如任何个体的当前生命从那些在肉体层面不易触及的隐藏维度中升起，并从无意识源头汲取其行动的能量和力量，同样地，你们所知的当前物质宇宙也从其他维度中升起。它也有其源头，并从更深的实相中获取其能量。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Using the inner senses, we become conscious creators, cocreators. But you are unconscious cocreators whether you know it or not. If our environment seems unstructured to you, it is only because you do not understand the true nature of order, which has nothing to do with permanent form, but only appears to have form from your perspective.
quotes.translation: 运用内在感官，我们成为有意识的创造者、共同创造者。但无论你是否知晓，你都是无意识的共同创造者。若你的环境看似毫无结构，那只是因为你尚未理解秩序的真实本质——它与永恒形态无关，仅从你的视角才呈现为形态。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In a projection the problems will be of a different sort. The form of a man for example, may be a thought form, or fragment sent quite unconsciously by another individual whom it resembles. It may be another projectionist like yourself. It may be a potential form like any potential object--a played-over-andover-again record of a form.
quotes.translation: 在投射中，问题将属于不同种类。例如，一个人的形态可能是另一个与其相似者无意识投射出的思想形态或碎片。它可能像你一样是另一位投射者，也可能像任何潜在物体一样是潜在形态——一种被反复播放的形态记录。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Barriers are broken down, and with them certain beliefs that were based upon them. If the unconscious is no longer feared, then the races that symbolized it are no longer to be feared either.
quotes.translation: 障碍被打破，随之瓦解的是基于这些障碍的某些信念。若不再恐惧无意识，那么象征它的种族也不再令人畏惧。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The Instreams did not consider going to York Beach. Neither was their visit a complete coincidence, although it might seem so. All experiences have an electrical reality. Your experiences at York Beach had such a reality, and having met you, not Dr. Instream but his wife unconsciously picked up this connection, and responded to it.
quotes.translation: 因斯特里姆夫妇并未考虑前往约克海滩。他们的造访也绝非全然巧合，尽管看似如此。所有经验都具有电性实相。你们在约克海滩的经历便拥有这种实相，而遇见你们之后，并非因斯特里姆博士本人，而是他的妻子无意识地捕捉到这种联结并做出了回应。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: All of the powers of your inner self are set into activation as a result of your conscious beliefs. You have lost a sense of responsibility for your conscious thought because you have been taught that it is not what forms your life. You have been told that regardless of your beliefs you are terrorized by unconscious conditioning.
quotes.translation: 你内在自我的所有力量都因你有意识的信念而被激活。你已丧失对自身有意识思想的责任感，因为你被教导说它并非塑造人生的要素。你被告知：无论你的信念如何，你都被无意识的条件作用所恐吓。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: You cannot get the results first for a test. It goes without saying that Ruburt's technical abilities and knowhow as a writer are developed. It is theoretically, but definitely, possible for an individual to suddenly perform an art for which he has in the past achieved no conscious knowledge or mastery, and to do it well. But usually expectations are just not that strong, and a conscious and unconscious preparation is necessary.
quotes.translation: 你无法先获得结果再进行验证。不言而喻，鲁柏作为作家的技术能力与专业知识已臻成熟。理论上——但确实可能——一个人能突然展现其过去从未有意识习得或掌握的技艺，并且表现得很好。但通常期待不会如此强烈，有意识与无意识的准备仍是必要的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: This alone will cause adverse experience, making you reject the very basis of your own framework of experience. You will consider the body as a thing, a fine vehicle but not in itself the natural living expression of your being in material form. Many such Eastern schools also stress -- as do numerous spiritualistic schools -- the importance of the "unconscious levels of the self," and teach you to mistrust the conscious mind.
quotes.translation: 仅此一点就会导致负面体验，使你拒绝自身经验架构的根本基础。你会将身体视为一件物品、一个精良的载具，而非你存有在物质形式中的自然鲜活表达。许多此类东方学派——如同众多唯灵论学派那样——也强调"自我无意识层面"的重要性，并教导你怀疑显意识心智。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: It is not true, of course, that before the time of modern psychology man had a concept of himself that dealt with conscious exterior aspects only, although it has been written that until that time man thought of himself as a kind of flat-surfaced self -- minus, for example, subconscious or unconscious complexity.
quotes.translation: 当然，在现代心理学出现之前，人类并非只具有关于自身显意识外在面向的概念——尽管有文献记载，直到那个时代，人类仍将自己视为某种扁平表面的自我——例如，缺乏潜意识或无意识的复杂性。
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Functions in this particular regard are habits. You simply forget how to hear properly, following your belief. All of the minute manipulations necessary to hearing are unconsciously repressed. The actual physical deterioration then does indeed follow. The deterioration however does not occur first, but after.
quotes.translation: 在此特定方面的功能即是习惯。你只是遵循信念而忘记了如何正确倾听。所有听觉所需的细微运作都被无意识地压抑了。随后确实会发生实际的生理退化。然而退化并非先发生，而是后发生。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: If, for example, you believe that after a certain time of life hearing will fade, then so it will. You will begin to use the faculty less and less, unconsciously transfer your attention to the other senses to compensate, and rely less and less upon your ears until the functions themselves do atrophy. Period.
quotes.translation: 例如，若你相信在某个年龄之后听力会衰退，那么它就会如此。你会越来越少使用这项官能，无意识地将注意力转移到其他感官作为补偿，越来越不依赖耳朵，直到这些功能本身真的萎缩。句号。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Dream experiences often, very often, change the course of human events. Again, all this takes place through the operation of electromagnetic systems. There is a definite connection between this constant dream activity undertaken by the unconscious self, and what you call inspiration or creative activity.
quotes.translation: 梦境体验常常——非常频繁地——改变人类事件的进程。再次强调，这一切都通过电磁系统的运作而发生。无意识自我持续进行的这种梦境活动，与你所谓的灵感或创造性活动之间存在着明确的关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: In the same way in the midst of life, you dwell with so-called ghosts and apparitions, and for that matter you yourselves appear as apparitions to others, particularly when you send strong thought-forms of yourself from the sleep state, or even when unconsciously you travel out of your physical body.
quotes.translation: 同样地，在生命过程中，你与所谓的鬼魂和幻影共存，就此而言，你们自己也会以幻影的形式出现在他人面前——尤其是当你在睡眠状态中发送出强烈的思想形态，或甚至在你无意识地离开肉身时。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: To the entity, your own consciousness could be likened to one stream of consciousness, in your terms. The greater part of your own identity, then, is completely aware of all of your conscious and unconscious living material. It is also aware of the same kind of data from all of (its and your) parts.
quotes.translation: 对本体而言，你们自己的意识可被比喻为一条意识之流（以你们的时间观来说）。因此，你们身份中较大部分完全觉察到你们所有有意识与无意识的活素材，也觉察到来自（它和你们的）所有部分相同种类的资料。
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Chemicals themselves will simply not give rise to consciousness or to life. Your scientists will simply have to face the facts that consciousness comes first, and evolves its own form. But this is, and involves, individuality, and also interdependence. The physical body that you imagine consists of some sort of separate consciousness, controlling a framework of completely unconscious parts, is quite farfetched.
quotes.translation: 化学物质本身根本无法产生意识或生命。你们的科学家终将面对事实：意识先于一切，并演化出自身的形态。但这涉及个体性，也涉及相互依存。你们想象中由某种独立意识控制着完全无意识部分框架的肉体，这种想法相当牵强。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: At the same time, in psychoanalysis you are often programmed to believe that the "unconscious," being the source of such dark secrets, cannot be counted upon as any bed of creativity or inspiration, and so you are denied the help that the inner portions of the self could give to your consciousness.
quotes.translation: 同时，在精神分析中，你们常被设定要相信"无意识"作为如此黑暗秘密的源头，不能被视为任何创造力或灵感的温床，因此你们被剥夺了内在自我部分本可给予意识的帮助。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text:
We learned the methods
so long ago
that they're unconscious,
and we've hypnotized ourselves
into believing
that we're the audience,
so I wonder where we served
our apprenticeship.
Under what master magicians did we learn
to form reality
so smoothly that we forgot to tell ourselves
the secret?
quotes.translation: 我们习得这些方法
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Man has been endowed, and has endowed himself, with a conscious mind to direct the nature, shape and form of his creations. All deep aspirations and unconscious motivations, all unspoken drives, rise up for the approval or disapproval of the conscious mind, and await its direction.
quotes.translation: 人类被赋予——也自赋予——有意识心智来指导其创造的本质、形状与形式。所有深层渴望与无意识动机，所有未说出的驱力，都升起等待有意识心智的认可或否定，并等候其指引。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Now I am speaking generally. Again, there are exceptions where memory is retained, but as a rule ghosts and apparitions are not any more aware of their effect upon others than you are when you appear quite unconsciously as ghosts in worlds that would be quite strange to you.
quotes.translation: 现在我泛泛而谈。再次强调，存在记忆保留的例外，但通常鬼魂与幻影对自身影响他人的觉察程度，并不比你们在完全无意识状态下作为鬼魂出现在对你们而言相当陌生的世界时更高。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now all the richly creative, original work that is done by this inner self is not unconscious. It is purposeful, highly (underlined) discriminating, performed by the inner conscious ego, of which the exterior ego is but a shadow, and not you see the other way around.
quotes.translation: 这个内在自体的所有丰富创意与原创性工作并非无意识。它们是有目的的、高度（划线强调）辨别的，由内在有意识自我执行，外在自我不过是其影子，而非如你所见的相反情况。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Let us make a clear distinction here: Your conscious beliefs direct the flow of unconscious processes which bring your ideas into physical reality, so while your thoughts cause your experience, you are not consciously aware of how this takes place (forcefully).
quotes.translation: 让我们在此明确区分：你的有意识信念引导着无意识过程的流向，这些过程将你的想法转化为物质实相。因此，虽然你的思想导致你的体验，你并未有意识地知晓这如何发生（强调语气）。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: There is no magic in hypnosis. Each of you utilize it constantly. (See the 620th session in Chapter Four.) Only when particular procedures are assigned to it, and when it is set aside from normal life, does hypnotic suggestion seem so esoteric. Structured hypnosis merely allows the subject to utilize full powers of concentration, thereby activating unconscious mechanisms.
quotes.translation: 催眠中并无魔法。你们每个人都在持续运用它。（见第四章第620节）只有当特定程序被赋予它，且当它被从日常生活中分离出来时，催眠暗示才显得如此深奥。结构化的催眠只是让受试者运用全神贯注的能力，从而激活无意识机制。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: They occur, comparatively speaking, just above that layer which Jung refers to as the collective unconscious. If you could perceive these dreams then you would have a good idea of the main physical events of the future, because you would see them being born.
quotes.translation: 相对而言，它们发生在荣格所称的集体无意识层面之上。如果你能感知这些梦，就能对未来主要物质事件有清晰概念，因为你会看到它们正在诞生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Knowledge is usually passed down through the ages in your reality, through books and historic writings, yet each individual contains within himself or herself a vast repository: direct knowledge of the past, in your terms, through unconscious comprehension.
quotes.translation: 在你们的实相中，知识通常通过书籍和历史著作代代相传，然而每个个体内在都蕴藏着巨大宝库：以你们的话说，通过无意识理解获得的直接过去知识。
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Earlier I compared your thoughts to viruses (in the last session). Think of them now as living electromagnetic cells, differing from the physical cells in your body only in the nature of their materialization. Your thoughts direct the overall functioning of your body's cells, even though you do not consciously know how those cells operate. That work is unconscious.
quotes.translation: 之前（在上一节）我将你们的思想比作病毒。现在将它们视为活生生的电磁细胞，与你们身体中的物质细胞仅在物质化性质上有所不同。你们的思想指导着身体细胞的整体运作，即使你们并未有意识地知道这些细胞如何运作。那项工作是无意识的。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Unconsciously, the physical methods at hand are used, then, in such endeavors. It is highly unusual, but possible, according to the strength of the psychic discontent, that the consciousness could then split itself up, some residing in the new image.
quotes.translation: 于是，在这种努力中，无意识地运用了手边的物质方法。根据心灵不满的强度，意识有可能分裂自身，部分存留于新形象中——这虽极不寻常，却有可能发生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Yes, but the conscious mind should know what the unconscious is doing. Consciousness is after all the goal.
quotes.translation: 是的，但意识心智应当知晓无意识在做什么。毕竟，意识才是目标。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now: There are basically no limitations to the self, and all portions of the self are connected -- so the probable selves are aware, unconsciously, of their relationships.
quotes.translation: 现在：自我基本上没有限制，自我的所有部分都相互关联——因此，可能自我无意识地知晓它们之间的关系。
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This intensity of conscious concentration cuts down barriers and allows the messages to go directly to the unconscious, where they are acted upon. The hypnotist, however, is important in that he acts as a direct representative of authority.
quotes.translation: 这种意识集中的强度削减了障碍，使信息能直接传递到无意识，并在那里被付诸行动。然而，催眠师的重要性在于他充当了权威的直接代表。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Now: You are the living picture of yourself. You project what you think you are outward into flesh. Your feelings, your conscious and unconscious thoughts, all alter and form your physical image. This is fairly easy for you to understand.
quotes.translation: 现在：你是自己的活生生的画像。你将你对自己的认知向外投射为肉身。你的感受、你的意识与无意识思想，都在改变并塑造你的身体形象。这对你而言相当容易理解。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: This process is carried out unconsciously, and yet if mankind follows through then he will become consciously aware of his own part in this continual creation of matter, and he will be able to continue in a much more intelligent manner.
quotes.translation: 这个过程是无意识进行的，然而如果人类坚持到底，他将有意识地觉察到自己在这场持续的物质创造中的角色，并能以更明智的方式继续下去。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The truth is then that you form your reality directly. You react consciously and unconsciously to your beliefs. You collect from the physical universe, and the interior one, data that seems to correlate with your beliefs.
quotes.translation: 事实是，你直接形成了你的实相。你有意识且无意识地反应你的信念。你从物质宇宙和内在宇宙中收集那些似乎与你的信念相符的数据。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: You must give up any ideas that you have as to the unsavory nature of unconscious activity. You must learn to believe in the goodness of your being. Otherwise you will not explore these other states of your own reality.
quotes.translation: 你必须放弃任何关于无意识活动本质不洁的想法。你必须学会相信你存在的良善。否则你将不会探索你自己实相的其他状态。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: This particular individual was quite aware of what would occur, on what you would call an unconscious basis. He was not predestined to die. He chose both the time, in your terms, and the method, for reasons of his own.
quotes.translation: 这个特定个体相当清楚会发生什么，在你们所谓的无意识基础上。他并非注定要死亡。他出于自己的理由，选择了时间（以你们的说法）和方法。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Ruburt was correct in the insight of a few moments earlier (during break). In my book we will be going deeper into the nature of the unconscious and the psyche, bringing out some concepts that are of greatest value.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏在片刻前（休息期间）的洞见是正确的。在我的书中，我们将更深入地探讨无意识和心灵的本质，提出一些极具价值的概念。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: What you have is this. Let us speak no more of a conscious self and a subconscious or unconscious self. There is one self, and it focuses its consciousness in various dimensions, and that is all.
quotes.translation: 事实是这样的。让我们不再谈论有意识自我和潜意识或无意识自我。只有一个自我，它将意识聚焦于不同维度，仅此而已。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: I am obviously also directed by my own unconscious, for there is always a principle that does not become conscious. This is a reserve, represents an overabundance, it is eternally inexpressible.
quotes.translation: 显然，我也受自己的无意识所引导，因为总有一个原则不会变得有意识。这是一个储备，代表一种过剩，它永远无法被表达。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Part of such a brain would have to be awake all of the time, and part engaged in unconscious activity. This is what happens.
quotes.translation: 这种大脑的一部分必须始终清醒，而另一部分则从事无意识活动。事实正是如此。
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json
